title: Ibidium coloratum
taxonomy: Ibidium coloratum is a species of beetle in the family Staphylinidae, commonly known as the rove beetles. This classification places Ibidium coloratum within the order Coleoptera, which comprises beetles. Further classification includes the suborder Polyphaga, as well as the infraorder Staphyliniformia. As a member of the family Staphylinidae, Ibidium coloratum is part of a large and diverse group of beetles. Its classification also reflects its physical characteristics and behaviors as a rove beetle.
